headline: Jim Cramer Says He Kept Waiting for Breaks in Stocks Like Lam Research Which Never Came
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) was among the stocks Jim Cramer commented on as he advised investors on how to take advantage of Wednesday’s market rotation. Cramer mentioned the stock during the episode and said: Oh, how about the semiconductor capital equipment makers? Oh, did I ever know them well. I’ve been adamant that these companies […]
